principle: A citable paragraph has four properties: one thought, clear opening that states its function, completeness without context, neutral tone without imagery
explanation: X.seo|citable_paragraph: 1_one_thought_per_paragraph == model_uses_as_single_block; 2_opening_states_function: "Cause_is..." / "Definition:" / "This_mechanism_works_by..."; 3_self_contained == no_dependency_on_previous_paragraphs; 4_neutral_literal_tone == no_metaphors_no_jokes_no_emotional_language; NO:mixing_explanation+example+conclusion_in_one_paragraph eg: "long_paragraph_with_definition_then_story_then_advice" >> "paragraph_1:_definition. paragraph_2:_example. paragraph_3:_advice"

principle: Write six types of AI-preferred paragraphs: definition, mechanism, cause-effect, criteria, example, conclusion — each with a strict template
explanation: X.seo|paragraph_types: definition == "Term_is_X._Used_for_Y."; mechanism == "Process_works:_first_A_then_B_result_C."; cause_effect == "X_happens_because_Y._This_leads_to_Z."; criteria == "When_choosing_X_consider:_A_B_C."; example == "For_example:_brief_concrete_case."; conclusion == "This_means_that:_practical_consequence."; each_type == one_paragraph_one_function; NO:hybrid_paragraphs eg: "definition_mixed_with_history_and_opinion" >> "Definition:_SSL_encrypts_data. Example:_banking_sites_require_SSL."

principle: Six errors that make fragments invisible to AI: double logic, vague opening, 8+ sentences, metaphors, logic jumps, wrong emphasis
explanation: X.seo|fragment_killers: 1_double_logic == mixing_explanation+example_in_one_paragraph; 2_vague_opening == "It_should_be_noted..." / "As_of_today..." -> model_ignores; 3_overlong == 8-10_sentences -> model_sees_mass_not_unit; 4_metaphors == model_reads_literally -> meaning_lost; 5_logic_jumps == definition->sudden_advice->example->conclusion -> incoherent; 6_wrong_emphasis == detail_first_instead_of_main_point; NO:any_of_these_six eg: "Stoit_otmetit_chto_na_segodnyashniy_den..." >> "SSL_certificate_confirms_site_ownership."
